text: This site hosts NeuroVault, a web application for archiving, sharing, displaying and decoding brain maps. It is easy to use, and works in all popular browsers without requiring installation of any additional software. The site utilizes all modern web technologies for an engaging visualization experience. All of the cognitive decoding power of Neurosynth is also at your disposal. Data are served via a REST API so that other web applications and tools may also take advantage of the data contained here. NeuroVault is a new tool for researchers interested in the analysis of brain function through meta-analyses and coactivation analyses.
explanation: The passage uses generic promotional phrasing and lacks concrete technical detail, a style often seen in AI-generated summaries. Its smooth, repetitive marketing tone suggests it may not be authored as a hand-written technical description.
